name: GUPT
short_description: Anonymous, end-to-end encrypted messenger on Nostr with WebRTC calls.
description: GUPT is a self-hosted, anonymous, end-to-end encrypted messenger with no accounts required. Built on Nostr relays with WebRTC for voice and video calls, it supports encrypted media uploads, group rooms, offline caching, and ships as an installable PWA.
usecases: Chat anonymously with end-to-end encrypted direct messages without creating an account or providing personal information such as a phone number or email address.
Host private group rooms for your team or community over your own Nostr relays, keeping all messages encrypted and off centralised servers.
Make encrypted WebRTC voice and video calls directly from the browser without installing any native app.
notes: No backend required — the app connects directly to public or private Nostr relays.
